records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Are you all right?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Are you all right?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Are you all right?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hearing your voice instantly cooled me down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hearing your voice instantly cooled me down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hearing your voice instantly cooled me down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I mean that in a good way. Don't take it the wrong way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I mean that in a good way. Don't take it the wrong way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I mean that in a good way. Don't take it the wrong way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My body finally stopped burning up...
records.m_Talk_DEU: My body finally stopped burning up...
records.m_Talk_FRA: My body finally stopped burning up...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But my CRF is draining way faster than usual.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But my CRF is draining way faster than usual.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But my CRF is draining way faster than usual.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So... what exactly happened while I was out of it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So... what exactly happened while I was out of it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So... what exactly happened while I was out of it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>You suddenly charged straight at the C.O.s.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>You suddenly charged straight at the C.O.s.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>You suddenly charged straight at the C.O.s.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kept mumbling about how your blood was boiling.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kept mumbling about how your blood was boiling.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kept mumbling about how your blood was boiling.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you sure an evil spirit didn't possess you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you sure an evil spirit didn't possess you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you sure an evil spirit didn't possess you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...No. That's not possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...No. That's not possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...No. That's not possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My body doesn't let things like that in.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My body doesn't let things like that in.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My body doesn't let things like that in.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway... this looks like the mansion entrance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway... this looks like the mansion entrance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway... this looks like the mansion entrance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Every facility in the estate connects to the mansion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Every facility in the estate connects to the mansion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Every facility in the estate connects to the mansion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the stench hit you the second you opened the door...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the stench hit you the second you opened the door...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the stench hit you the second you opened the door...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then the evil spirit's here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then the evil spirit's here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then the evil spirit's here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right, let's take a look around.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right, let's take a look around.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right, let's take a look around.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sniff* It's close.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sniff* It's close.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sniff* It's close.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this where the evil spirit is hiding?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this where the evil spirit is hiding?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this where the evil spirit is hiding?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Something worse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something worse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something worse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The smell of jewelry left to rot.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The smell of jewelry left to rot.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The smell of jewelry left to rot.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... how long has it been locked away, weeping in despair...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... how long has it been locked away, weeping in despair...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... how long has it been locked away, weeping in despair...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stay focused.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stay focused.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stay focused.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shouldn't a nun be free of greed?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shouldn't a nun be free of greed?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shouldn't a nun be free of greed?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you don't exactly look like you're in top shape, so why does money even matter right now?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you don't exactly look like you're in top shape, so why does money even matter right now?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you don't exactly look like you're in top shape, so why does money even matter right now?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I've got a rare sickness where seeing money instantly cures me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I've got a rare sickness where seeing money instantly cures me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I've got a rare sickness where seeing money instantly cures me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe... Hehehe...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe... Hehehe...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe... Hehehe...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not a bad haul.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not a bad haul.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not a bad haul.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But like I said, evil spirits are naturally drawn to wealth.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But like I said, evil spirits are naturally drawn to wealth.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But like I said, evil spirits are naturally drawn to wealth.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? What's that...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? What's that...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? What's that...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's another body here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's another body here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's another body here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This... this can't be...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This... this can't be...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This... this can't be...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought everyone had been evacuated...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought everyone had been evacuated...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought everyone had been evacuated...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Something's odd about this one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Something's odd about this one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Something's odd about this one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Overgrown fur, unnaturally long fangs...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Overgrown fur, unnaturally long fangs...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Overgrown fur, unnaturally long fangs...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Elongated claws...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Elongated claws...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Elongated claws...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This isn't just a human corpse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This isn't just a human corpse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This isn't just a human corpse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is... a corpse of a <color=#ffd34c>beast</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is... a corpse of a <color=#ffd34c>beast</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is... a corpse of a <color=#ffd34c>beast</color>.
